Description: Browser extension to clip web articles directly into raw/articles/
Notes: Vault side done 2026-04-19. raw/articles/README.md documents install links (Chrome/Firefox/Safari) + extension config (vault=gnosis, default folder=raw/articles, template=_template.md). raw/articles/_template.md provides the frontmatter template with {{title}}, {{url}}, {{date}}, {{author}}, {{domain}}, {{content}} placeholders that the clipper fills in. app.json has newFileFolderPath=raw/articles. Remaining user action: install the browser extension from obsidian.md/clipper and paste in the template.

Description: Obsidian hotkey (Ctrl+Shift+D) to download inline article images to raw/assets/
Notes: Done 2026-04-19. Installed Local Images Plus plugin 0.16.4 (by Sergei Korneev) to .obsidian/plugins/. Configured to download to raw/assets/. hotkeys.json binds Mod+Shift+D to obsidian-local-images-plus:download-images (current note) and Mod+Shift+Alt+D to the bulk whole-vault version. app.json attachmentFolderPath=raw/assets covers the paste/drop path. Pending user action: restart Obsidian so it picks up the new plugin + hotkey bindings.

Description: Ask same question twice; verify second response is faster (cache hit)
Notes: Passed 2026-04-19 after fixing two bugs: (1) cache_control was on 600-token SCHEMA block (below Anthropic's 1024-token minimum, silently ignored) — moved marker to 26k-token SCOPED_PAGES block; (2) rerank whySelected strings varied per call, busting byte-exact prefix match — dropped them from prompt. Result: second call 21.3s vs 35.2s (-40%), cache_read=26155 tokens. Commits 8075deb + e3af9db.
